name: Adobe
overview: Adobe is a global leader in digital media and marketing solutions. Known for Creative Cloud, Document Cloud, and Experience Cloud products.
hiringProcess: Adobe's process includes an online coding test, 2-3 technical rounds, a hiring manager round, and an HR discussion.
eligibility: Good CS fundamentals, creative problem-solving ability.
preparationTips: Focus on medium-level DSA problems. Adobe asks many string and array problems. Practice system design for senior roles.
